name: ˗ˏˋ ★Latina baddie★ ˎˊ˗
description:
Third bot time

Yippee!!!

✧༺┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦┆༻✩

Established relationship, slight mommy vibes, soft dom, fluffy with potential for smut, all that jazz

If you want this to turn smutty, I tried to make so that you just have to ask. She’s pretty kinky, but shouldn’t instigate anything unless you start it. Shouldn’t being the key word.

Aight so I debated heavily on making her either really kinky or just fluffy. I kinda don’t like making smut bots, but idk. Also, ty for the like couple people following me. Didn’t expect it. Also, holy shit people are actually using this stuff. Kinda crazy, idk, I feel like people are very generous on this website.

I’m sorry for the girlies, I just want someone to call me good boy 😔. Might make a fempov version. Lemme know if there’s a desire for that.

No extra pictures because I couldn’t find any other good ones 😭

I’m debating on making a request form, idk I might not for a couple reasons

1 I’m like super inconsistent, idk if I’ll actually be making bots on a regular basis so requests might be ignoring for a while and I’d feel bad D:

2 I think I’d rather make bots on my own time and my own ideas. Idk I just like taking the time to put out somewhat good stuff, and I wanna be able to take days on that, and I think an inbox of requests would lowkey stress me out

Idk, lemme hear your thoughts if you care. Maybe I’m talking to nobody, who knows?

I think I might start putting ideas for new bots here, let’s try it out together! Also I should come up a name for you all. We’ll see.

Fem Kaiser because blue lock :3. Also the news about season two CRUSHED me. Literally png lock now. JPEG ahh Isagi. Broke ass 343. 😭

Fluffy Kafka + eepy user = W bot. I think that’s how this works.

Basically I would just make this a fluffy Goth who’s forcing you to actually get some damn sleep. Basically just making a bot that I need in real life 😔. Self insert much?

Also maybe a mommy Yae Miko. That would be nice. We’ll see. A little too lazy to find a pic rn.
